scripts.extract-graph: npm run build -w semantic-graph-extractor && node semantic-graph-extractor/dist/index.js
scripts.generate:request-validation: npm run generate -w request-validation && npm run biome:fix-generated
scripts.generate:request-validation:shallow: npm run generate:shallow -w request-validation && npm run biome:fix-generated
scripts.codegen:playwright: npm run build:analyser && node path-analyser/dist/src/codegen/index.js && npm run biome:fix-generated
scripts.codegen:playwright:all: npm run build:analyser && node path-analyser/dist/src/codegen/index.js --all && npm run biome:fix-generated
scripts.test:pw: npm run test:pw:path-analyser && npm run test:pw:request-validation
scripts.testsuite:generate: npm run extract-graph && npm run generate:scenarios && npm run codegen:playwright:all
scripts.testsuite:observe:run: npm run codegen:playwright:all && npm run test:pw:path-analyser && npm run observe:aggregate
scripts.pipeline: npm run fetch-spec && npm run testsuite:generate && npm run generate:request-validation
